testcase.name: Journey 1: Homepage scanner — input, scan, results › scanner input is visible on /en homepage
Journey 1: Homepage scanner — input, scan, results › scanner: type URL and click Scan button
Journey 1: Homepage scanner — input, scan, results › scanner: submit and wait for risk score + risk level
Journey 1: Homepage scanner — input, scan, results › scanner: findings list or checks summary appears after scan
Journey 1: Homepage scanner — input, scan, results › scanner: Enter key triggers scan
Journey 1: Homepage scanner — input, scan, results › scanner: empty input — Scan button stays disabled
Journey 1: Homepage scanner — input, scan, results › scanner: invalid URL shows error message
Journey 2: Dedicated scan page /en/scan › /en/scan page loads with scanner input
Journey 2: Dedicated scan page /en/scan › /en/scan: type URL and scan — results render
Journey 3: POST /api/scan — direct API test › returns ok:true with report containing riskScore, riskLevel, findings
Journey 3: POST /api/scan — direct API test › returns 400 for missing URL
Journey 3: POST /api/scan — direct API test › returns 400 for non-GitHub URL
Journey 3: POST /api/scan — direct API test › returns 404 when SKILL.md not found
Journey 3: POST /api/scan — direct API test › cached response includes cached:true on second request
Journey 4: GET /api/scan/badge/:hash.svg › returns SVG content-type for valid hex hash
Journey 4: GET /api/scan/badge/:hash.svg › badge has cache-control header set
Journey 4: GET /api/scan/badge/:hash.svg › badge returns SVG even for too-short hash (fallback to unknown)
Journey 4: GET /api/scan/badge/:hash.svg › badge hash from real scan returns valid SVG

property.name: skip
property.value: Rate limited (429) — use a known hash for badge tests instead

testcase.name: Journey 5: Localization — /zh-TW › /zh-TW loads and shows Chinese text
Journey 5: Localization — /zh-TW › /zh-TW scanner input is present and functional
Journey 5: Localization — /zh-TW › /zh-TW scanner produces results

property.name: skip
property.value: Rate limited (UI) — too many API calls in this session. Test is valid.

testcase.name: Journey 5: Localization — /zh-TW › /en and /zh-TW show the same risk score for same URL

property.name: skip
property.value: Rate limited on /en — skipping score parity check
